programme.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
programme.desc: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

programme.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
programme.desc: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

programme.title: 40 Global No.1s Of The 80s!
programme.desc: Join MTV 80s as we count down 50 of the best hits that hit the top spot worldwide in the 1980s!

programme.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1985!
programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1985!

programme.title: Pump Up The 80s Party!
programme.desc: We've chosen all of the best 80s hits to go into one epic 80s party playlist. So pump up the volume and get ready to dance with some classic 80s tunes!

programme.title: ... So 80s!
programme.desc: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!

programme.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
programme.desc: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

programme.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
programme.desc: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

programme.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
programme.desc: We've gone back to the 80s here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

programme.title: Forever 80s
programme.desc: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

programme.title: 40 Greatest Voices Of The 80s!
programme.desc: The 80s provided us some of the greatest voices in music - and we're playing 40 of them right now!

programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1986!

programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1987!

programme.title: 80s Legends!
programme.desc: From Madonna to Duran Duran, Whitney to Prince, we've got memorable song after song from the most amazing 80s legends - all in one playlist!

programme.desc: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

programme.title: 40 Super 80s Pop Hits!
